title: calotis cuneata
intro: Calotis cuneata, also known as the wedge-leaved bush calotis, is a plant species native to Australia, characterized by its wedge-shaped leaves and yellow or white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calotis cuneata include its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a promising treatment for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Calotis cuneata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
